short_description: Automatically audit every carrier invoice for overcharges, duplicate payments, and billing errors using AI. Works with Samsara fleet data to cross-reference mileage and fuel data against carrier charges.
long_description:
EDGE77 connects to Samsara to automatically import fleet mileage, fuel usage, and trip data. When a carrier invoice arrives, EDGE77 cross-references the charged mileage and fuel surcharge against your Samsara GPS data to detect overbilling.

How it works:
1. Choose invoices to audit (or enable auto-ingestion)
2. EDGE77 extracts 19+ fields from each invoice using AI
3. Data is cross-referenced against your Samsara fleet data and contracted rates
4. Overcharges are flagged with detailed findings
5. Approve disputes and send carrier-ready dispute letters

The result: automated recovery of 2-5% of total freight spend without manual effort.
key_features: AI invoice extraction with OCR for scanned documents
Contract rate validation against 19+ data points per invoice
Samsara fleet data integration for mileage and fuel verification
Automated dispute letter generation per overcharge
integration_benefits: Import fleet mileage data from Samsara to verify carrier distance charges
Cross-reference fuel usage data against fuel surcharge line items
Match vehicle assignments to specific shipments for accurate auditing
Automated data sync — no manual data entry required
pricing: Free tier available. Subscription plans start at $0/month (contingency-based). Visit https://edge77.app/pricing
